creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
After updating to package version 7.1.0.3_2 from official repo libreoffice fails to start with "Application Error". Splash screen appears after launching, then application exists. Here is the sample session:

> libreoffice 
QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-rm'
Application Error

> /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/soffice --writer
QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-rm'
Application Error

> libreoffice --writer
QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-rm'
Application Error

It's on 14-current.
